Name: Percentage of cases where 'Payment Handled' occurs after 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' compared to all cases ending with 'Payment Handled'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in variants that include at least one rejection (e.g., 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER') versus variants with no rejections
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' occurrences that are preceded by 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' anywhere in the case
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events in cases that originally included a 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' but eventually reached completion
Metric: Number of 'Payment Handled' activities for cases where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' occurs

Name: Percentage of total activity executions that are 'Payment Handled' compared to the percentage of 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in the shortest successful variant (e.g., 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled') versus variants with rework loops
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' events that follow a path without any rejection activities, specifically excluding paths containing 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Ratio of 'Payment Handled' occurrences to 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' occurrences across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Percentage of cases ending with 'Payment Handled' that never encountered 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER', 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION', or 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in variants that include 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' without subsequent rejection by the same role
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' events that occur within variants starting with 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and containing no rejections before final approval
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events associated with amounts above 100 euros in cases that previously experienced a 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: Number of 'Payment Handled' activities > 100 where ma is the last value of case:Amount

Name: Percentage of all completed cases (ending with 'Payment Handled') that passed through the 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' step without being rejected by the PRE_APPROVER
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Frequency of direct transitions from 'Request Payment' to 'Payment Handled' in cases that avoided any rejection activity, including 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events grouped by year to assess temporal trends in resolution efficiency
